title: Sika Everbuild Black Jack Strong Self Adhesive Flashing Tape – Natural Lead-Look Finish – 75mm x 10m
features: ECONOMICAL – Cost-effective solution for replacing lead flashing. Because it's not made of lead, it also reduces the chances of theft.
SELF-ADHESIVE – No need for additional glue, the self-adhesive forms simply by pressing the tape into place by hand.
VERSATILE – Bonds quickly to roof ridges and insulating materials. Suitable for the repair of lead gutters, general flashing, repairs cracks in concrete.
LONG-LASTING – Provides a strong, durable, waterproof seal.
MULTIPLE WIDTHS – Also available in widths of 100mm, 150mm, 225mm, 300mm and 450mm making it suitable for a wide range of applications.
MULTIPLE LENGTHS – In addition to multiple widths and the 10-metre length, the tape is also available in 3-metre lengths. Please note that not all widths are available in the 3-metre length.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? Before application, all surfaces must be dry, sound and free from oil, grease and dust. Remove all loose material by scraper or wire brush. Cut the Black Jack Flashing Tape to the required length. Peel back approximately 5 cm of release back cover and place the tape into position. Continue removing the release back cover whilst firmly placing the tape to avoid unnecessary creasing. Ensure intimate contact with no trapped air. Use a small roller to seal edges and overlaps properly. Overlaps must be at least 25 mm. WHERE TO USE IT? The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup.
